raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserts a principle of personal agency and mindset primacy to guide therapeutic focus toward internal cognitive factors",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "thoughts, vision, and ideal are the decisive determinants of life outcomes",
    "environmental factors are secondary or non-determinative",
    "individuals possess sufficient control over their thoughts/vision/ideal to shape their trajectory"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a prescriptive motivational claim but logically incomplete by presupposing unidirectional causation from mind to outcome without reciprocal environmental influence",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the individual benefits from strengthening internal locus of control and the statement is applied within a context where cognitive reframing can incrementally affect behavior or perception without denying external constraints",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is taken literally to imply that external adversity or structural barriers can be overcome solely by altering thoughts, leading to self-blame or neglect of actionable environmental changes"
}
